2603.22985.title: Beyond Hate: Differentiating Uncivil and Intolerant Speech in Multimodal Content Moderation
2603.22985.paper_summary: Current multimodal toxicity benchmarks typically use a single binary hatefulness label. This coarse approach conflates two fundamentally different characteristics of expression: tone and content. Drawing on communication science theory, we introduce a fine-grained annotation scheme that distinguishes two separable dimensions: incivility (rude or dismissive tone) and intolerance (content that attacks pluralism and targets groups or identities) and apply it to 2,030 memes from the Hateful Memes dataset. We evaluate different vision-language models under coarse-label training, transfer learning across label schemes and a joint learning approach that combines the coarse hatefulness label with our fine-grained annotations. Our results show that fine-grained annotations complement existing coarse labels and, when used jointly, improve overall model performance. Moreover, models trained with the fine-grained scheme exhibit more balanced moderation-relevant error profiles and are less prone to under-detection of harmful content than models trained on hatefulness labels alone (FNR-FPR, the difference between false negative and false positive rates: 0.74 to 0.42 for LLaVA-1.6-Mistral-7B; 0.54 to 0.28 for Qwen2.5-VL-7B). This work contributes to data-centric approaches in content moderation by improving the reliability and accuracy of moderation systems through enhanced data quality. Overall, combining both coarse and fine-grained labels provides a practical route to more reliable multimodal moderation.
2603.22985.paper_summary_zh: 目前的多模態毒性基準通常使用單一的二元仇恨標籤。這種粗略的方法混淆了表達的兩個根本不同的特徵：語調和內容。基於傳播科學理論，我們引入了一種細緻的註釋方案，區分兩個可分離的維度：不文明（粗魯或輕視的語調）和不寬容（攻擊多元主義並針對群體或身份的內容），並將其應用於來自仇恨迷因數據集的2,030個迷因。我們在粗標籤訓練、跨標籤方案的遷移學習以及結合粗仇恨標籤與我們細緻註釋的聯合學習方法下評估不同的視覺-語言模型。我們的結果顯示，細緻的註釋補充了現有的粗標籤，並且在共同使用時，提高了整體模型性能。此外，使用細緻方案訓練的模型展現出更平衡的與審核相關的錯誤特徵，並且比僅用仇恨標籤訓練的模型更不容易漏檢有害內容（FNR-FPR，假陰性和假陽性率之間的差異：LLaVA-1.6-Mistral-7B從0.74降至0.42；Qwen2.5-VL-7B從0.54降至0.28）。這項工作通過提高數據質量，促進了內容審核中以數據為中心的方法，增強了審核系統的可靠性和準確性。總體而言，結合粗標籤和細緻標籤提供了一條實用的途徑，以實現更可靠的多模態審核。
2603.22985.author: Nils A. Herrmann et.al.
2603.22985.authors: Nils A. Herrmann, Tobias Eder, Jingyi He, Georg Groh
